title: CloudDash pricing plans overview
content:
CloudDash offers four subscription tiers designed for teams of all sizes:

| Plan       | Price           | Resources | Seats | Key Features                            |
|------------|-----------------|-----------|-------|-----------------------------------------|
| Starter    | $49 / month     | Up to 50  | 3     | Basic monitoring, 7-day metric history  |
| Growth     | $149 / month    | Up to 250 | 15    | SSO, anomaly detection, 30-day history  |
| Scale      | $499 / month    | Unlimited | Unlimited | Custom alerts, 90-day raw history   |
| Enterprise | Custom pricing  | Unlimited | Unlimited | SLA, dedicated support, private cloud |

**Annual billing:** 20% discount on all plans when paid annually (Growth and above).

**Add-ons (available on Growth and above):**
- Log Aggregation: $29/month per 10 GB/day ingestion.
- Extended Retention: $0.10/GB/month beyond plan limits.
- Premium Support: $299/month — 1-hour SLA response time.

**Free trial:** 14-day free trial on all plans, no credit card required. Trial accounts default to Growth plan features. After trial, the account downgrades to Starter unless upgraded.
